CVE-2023-32570.title: VideoLAN dav1d before 1.2.0 has a thread_task.c race condition th ...
CVE-2023-32570.description: VideoLAN dav1d before 1.2.0 has a thread_task.c race condition that can lead to an application crash, related to dav1d_decode_frame_exit.

CVE-2024-1580.title: An integer overflow in dav1d AV1 decoder that can occur when deco ...
CVE-2024-1580.description: An integer overflow in dav1d AV1 decoder that can occur when decoding videos with large frame size. This can lead to memory corruption within the AV1 decoder. We recommend upgrading past version 1.4.0 of dav1d.
